parameters.name: Include Text Details
parameters.description: Include text lines and element references in the result. Default: True (just for FR Connector).

parameters.name: Pages
parameters.description: The page selection for multi-page PDF and TIFF documents, to extract Invoice information from individual pages and a range of pages (like page 2, and pages 5-7) by entering the page numbers and ranges separated by commas (e.g. '2, 5-7'). If not set, all pages will be processed.

parameters.name: Locale
parameters.description: Locale of the invoice. Supported locale includes: en-US.

parameters.name: Document/Image File Content
parameters.description: A PDF document or image (JPG or PNG) file to analyze.

parameters.name: Document/Image URL
parameters.description: Url path for input file. Alternative to Document/Image File Content.

returns.raw:
Status and result of the queued analyze operation.
- Body
- BusinessCardAnalyzeOperationResult

AnalyzeDocumentV30.displayName: Analyze Document for Prebuilt or Custom models (v3.x API)

parameters.name: Document Intelligence API version

Custom modelId format - [a-zA-Z0-9][a-zA-Z0-9._~-]{1,63}. Unique model name.

parameters.name: Pages
parameters.description: The page selection for multi-page PDF and TIFF documents, to extract Invoice information from individual pages and a range of pages (like page 2, and pages 5-7) by entering the page numbers and ranges separated by commas (e.g. '2, 5-7'). If not set, all pages will be processed.

parameters.name: Locale
parameters.description: Locale hint for text recognition and document analysis. Value may contain only the language code (ex. "en", "fr") or BCP 47 language tag (ex. "en-US").

parameters.name: String Index Type
parameters.description: Method used to compute string offset and length. Supported options: textElements, unicodeCodePoint, utf16CodeUnit.

parameters.name: Optional and Premium features
parameters.description: List of optional analysis features ( such as ocrHighResolution, languages, barcodes, formulas, keyValuePairs and styleFont).

parameters.name: Document/Image File Content
parameters.description: A PDF document or image (JPG, PNG, BMP, TIFF) file to analyze.

parameters.name: Document/Image URL

returns.raw:
Status and result of the analyze operation.

- AnalyzeResultOperation_V30
